{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320165450EBBF389C32D769A3082E"}"},"total":17},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611587871013077822","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我看得好细，是需要细嚼慢咽的一本书，每个角色都值得认真去看，每个人的生命都不乏味……我真的很喜欢超喜欢无敌喜欢这本，都看看吧别逼我求你们。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772218268,"group_id":"7562076400191032345","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"别来刺激我的厌蠢症谢谢","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3ahAi7fpqIQIxzT3i9AuPk=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d147082490db4d2ab96ea429c09a1435~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537812&x-signature=e9Kh2yPXZAVjzbbqAJ%2F4C9Xk5vE%3D","user_id":"783302874118423","user_name":"全网不唯一业余预言家"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"783302874118423","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7562076400191032345","book_info":{"abstract":"【腹黑帝王攻平怀瑱X儒雅伴读受何瑾弈】
【精品小说+双男主+双强+古耽+HE+1V1+双洁+宫廷+权谋】
【从三十年前羁绊至今。之所以没有退路，是因为步步往前时，早已挥刀自断身后路愿天下和你，尽收囊中。 强强，太子x伴读】

何瑾弈年少顺遂，却因家族巨变跌入低谷，而这一切与平怀瑱的身世和权力斗争密切相关。尽管经历误解与分离，但二人始终相依相伴。

平怀瑱虽出身复杂，被皇后抚养，生母另有所出，但身边多数人物对其怀有善意，皇帝始终偏爱他，最终禅位于他。

登基后，他未立后纳妃，收养夺嫡失败皇子为嗣，任命胞弟为摄政王，与何瑾弈归隐相伴。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/f499bc8bc1dbaad0a2c1cd8edbf955cc~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"杜冒菜","author_id":"","book_id":"7562076400191032345","book_name":"山河怀璧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c0a078","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"2.6万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":972,"name":"情感小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=972&name=情感小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7562102389386251289","read_count":"13604","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"331335"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"107","tags":"精品小说,情感小说","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f499bc8bc1dbaad0a2c1cd8edbf955cc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180890&x-signature=wCDqwtFkK510UfNEV6852OQ5gBk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"173"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320165450EBBF389C32D769A3082E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读18小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1562,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":63095,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1952},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610238494850073368","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"古🥚强强就是最牛的！！！！！！！！！老师文字好细腻！！！！！！两只一定要一直幸福下去呀！！！！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771899778,"group_id":"7562076400191032345","service_id":2,"statu
